# Theorem: Fake Conversions Redirect Budget

## Statement
Budget allocated by observed conversion share is:

\[
B_i=B\frac{C_i}{\sum_j C_j}
\]

If fake conversions \(F_i>0\) are added:

\[
\tilde{B}_i=B\frac{C_i+F_i}{F_i+\sum_j C_j}
\]

Then \(\tilde{B}_i>B_i\) whenever \(C_i<\sum_j C_j\).

## Relevance
Fake leads, invalid traffic, and attribution theft can redirect budget even when there is no real demand.
